results.rendered_html:
anvakṣa a. [anugataḥakṣaṃ iṃdriyaṃ gatisamā.]
1 Visible, perceptible.
2 Following, close on the heels of, immediately following.
— kṣaṃ ind.
1 Afterwards, after; āroha tvaṃ… sītāṃ cāropayānvakṣaṃ  Rām. 
2 Immediately after, forthwith, directly;  Y. 3. 21.
